keyEvents.text: Elliot Anderson (England) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Lisandro Martínez (Argentina) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Cristian Romero (Argentina) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! England 1, Argentina 0. Anthony Gordon (England) right footed shot from very close range to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Morgan Rogers with a cross.
Substitution, Argentina. Nico González replaces Leandro Paredes.
Substitution, England. Ezri Konsa replaces Anthony Gordon.
Substitution, Argentina. Gonzalo Montiel replaces Nahuel Molina.
Substitution, Argentina. Rodrigo De Paul replaces Giuliano Simeone.
Substitution, Argentina. Nicolás Otamendi replaces Lisandro Martínez.
Substitution, Argentina. Lautaro Martínez replaces Nicolás Tagliafico.
Substitution, England. Dan Burn replaces Reece James because of an injury.
Substitution, England. Nico O'Reilly replaces Declan Rice.
Goal! England 1, Argentina 1. Enzo Fernández (Argentina) right footed shot from outside the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Lionel Messi following a corner.
Goal! England 1, Argentina 2. Lautaro Martínez (Argentina) header from very close range to the top left corner. Assisted by Lionel Messi with a cross.
Rodrigo De Paul (Argentina) is shown the yellow card.
Substitution, England. Ivan Toney replaces John Stones.
Substitution, England. Marcus Rashford replaces Djed Spence.
